The Wicker Man (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $24,413,467Details
International Box Office $13,308,360
Worldwide Box Office $37,721,827
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,610,204 (39.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.54 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:64.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,784 opening theaters/2,784 max. theaters, 3.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $44,679,313

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 1st, 2006 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
MPA Rating: PG-13 for disturbing images and violence, language and thematic issues
Running Time: 103 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Plot point: Beat Cops, Car Accident, Dysfunctional Family, Human Sacrifice, Missing Person, Surprise Twist
Social setting: Cults
Subgenre: Psychological Horror
Target audience: Cult Movie
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Alcon Entertainment, Millennium Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
